query: List all datasets that use the schema 'Journey Inbound'.

trace.sql: SELECT DISTINCT D.COLLECTIONID AS collection_id, D.NAME AS collection_name FROM hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS SD JOIN dim_collection AS D ON SD.COLLECTIONID = D.COLLECTIONID JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON SD.BLUEPRINTID = S.BLUEPRINTID WHERE S.NAME = 'Journey Inbound'
